translation.rateLimitDescription: You have reached the translation limit. Please try again later.
translation.quotaDescription: You have exceeded your monthly translation quota. Please contact support.
translation.translationErrorDescription: Could not translate content. Please try again.

ai.service_unavailable: AI content generation is currently unavailable. Check your plan or contact support.
ai.rate_limited: Too many requests to the AI service. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
ai.quota_exceeded: You have exceeded your AI content generation quota. Contact support to upgrade.
ai.upstream_error: The AI provider is experiencing issues. Please try again in a few minutes.
ai.network_error: Could not reach the AI service. Please check your internet connection.
ai.internal_error: An internal error occurred while generating content. Please try again.
ai.unknown: Could not generate content. Please try again or contact support.
